ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test suite */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test suite */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test suite */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test suite was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test suite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the module belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the module */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the module */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name or ID of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration in which the test case is executed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test case */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last updated */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to execute the test case */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time taken to execute the test case */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executed test case */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to execute the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test case */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test result */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the test case */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test case was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case associated with the defect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the defect */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who reported the defect */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was reported */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the defect */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to fix the defect */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the QA process */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for access records */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the test case */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who granted the access */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was granted */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the access */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was last updated */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test plan was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test plan */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the test plan */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test plan was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plan_cases" (
  "plan_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record linking test cases to test plans */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test plan */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the link */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the link */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_cases_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_cases_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)
